const b64 = '';
const page = figma.root.children.find(p => p.id === '2503:2');
await figma.setCurrentPageAsync(page);
const raw = Uint8Array.from(atob(b64), c => c.charCodeAt(0));
const img = figma.createImage(raw);
const node = await figma.getNodeByIdAsync('7975:2256');
node.fills = [{ type: 'IMAGE', imageHash: img.hash, scaleMode: 'FILL' }];
return { done: '1.3-community-profile-page', hash: img.hash };
